name: Kirsten
subject: we won't be intimidated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
The price I've paid for advocating for women.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ab/2ae112ef/10b14146/357aaddd/1988828782/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ab/2ae112ef/10b14146/357aaddd/1988828782/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
When I called on Al Franken to resign, I paid a price. I made a lot of establishment Democratic donors angry, and they launched attacks in the press. Everyone had the same facts--there were eight credible allegations of sexual harassment and abuse that were corroborated in real time--and I refused to remain silent.
People who are used to buying power and influence don't like to be challenged. Wealthy megadonors pulled money and tried to intimidate us into silence.
**Let me tell you this: We will never accept a system that rewards sexism and silences women. But running true to our values means showing we won 't back down.** These early moments are critical, and we need $10,000 by midnight to show the strength of our movement and take on establishment money and win.
**No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PAC --just us. I need you to give every dollar you can now to help us do it. Here's the link to donate right now, before midnight:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ab/2ae112ef/10b14146/357aaddc/1988828782/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NjItZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2762-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
If it's the right thing to do, I will do it. And advocating for women is the right thing to do.
Thank you,
Kirsten
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Give $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2762-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Another temper tantrum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Trump is declaring a fake national emergency just to get his wall built.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a2b0/2f5ea88d/7891b7f4/2cbd1d5e/1763474658/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/this-is-not-a-national-emergency?utm_source=ema_2019-02-16_no-national-emergency&source=ema_2019-02-16_no-national-emergency&utm_campaign=no-national-emergency&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Yesterday morning, President Trump pulled another temper tantrum and declared a fake national emergency just to get his wall built. This is not a national emergency for our country -- it's a political emergency for the president. Look, we face _real_ national emergencies -- like gun violence and the incredible threat of climate change. President Trump's senseless wall is not one of them. This announcement is legally dubious, ego-driven, and spurred on by hatred. It's never been more clear that the real emergency America is facing is in the Oval Office. We need new leadership to address the true pressing concerns of this generation. We need new leadership who will put the same attention and resources towards fighting real disasters as Trump put towards his pet project. [**Do you agree that President Trump is fabricating a national emergency? Sign on right now to stand with me and promise you'll vote for real leadership in 2020.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a2b0/2f5ea88d/7891b7f4/2cbd1d5e/1763474658/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/this-is-not-a-national-emergency?utm_source=ema_2019-02-16_no-national-emergency&source=ema_2019-02-16_no-national-emergency&utm_campaign=no-national-emergency&utm_medium=ema") We simply can't accept this. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a2b0/2f5ea88d/7891b7f4/2cbd1d5e/1763474658/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/this-is-not-a-national-emergency?utm_source=ema_2019-02-16_no-national-emergency&source=ema_2019-02-16_no-national-emergency&utm_campaign=no-national-emergency&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a2b0/2f5ea88d/7891b7f4/2cbd1d5d/1763474658/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: #EmergencyIMPEACH
body:
Activist - On February 15, 2019 Donald Trump declared a fake "National Emergency" so he could steal taxpayer money to build his partisan racist re-election ~~Wall~~ Fence.

[**Trump 's declaration is clearly an impeachable offense:**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/GLCeY/6/nN/r5cs/6fClRP/ccl6aIZGk/P/P)
* There is absolutely no emergency on our southern border - Trump's own national security advisors said so. Trump is deliberately lying to the American people, which is itself a dictatorial abuse of the Presidency.
* Trump's dictatorial abuse of his "National Emergency" powers is a direct assault on the "National Emergency" law, which was written for true emergencies, not partisan politics. It is also a direct assault on the Constitution, which gives Congress exclusive power to allocate taxpayer money.
* Even Republicans know this is a clear abuse of Presidential authority, but they are putting blind partisanship ahead of their Constitutional duties.

Since stealing the White House with illegal help from Russia, Trump has committed dozens of impeachable offenses. As a result, House Democrats have already launched several investigations that could lead to impeachment, as has Special Prosecutor Robert Mueller.

This Monday (February 18) is President's Day, and we're joining a broad progressive coalition against Trump's fake crisis and racist deportation force. **[Sign up for a local protest here.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/GLCeY/s/nG/r5cs/6fClRP/U61XPLibW1/P/P)**

Trump's fake "National Emergency" is such a clear assault on the Constitution that Democrats must begin the formal process of Impeachment immediately. [**Please sign our petition at EmergencyIMPEACH.com.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/GLCeY/v/nN/r5cs/6fClRP/ssevdmQEXO/P/P) Thanks for defending the Constitution of the United States. Bob Fertik [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/GLCeY/z/nN/r5cs/6fClRP/sH2MrmOpXC/P/P)
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDc4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjkwMDI2NTg1)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: FWD: National Emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Democrats already obstructing |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9ea2b55896757316397225eb7f27bca5926f04f70d89293377ceef455b7f7fed4878b2d0deca66d853ef145aa6c84150cc6d8b5867bbac95)
---

Friend,

Even before President Trump finished his speech on the White House lawn, Senate Democrats had introduced a bill to stop him from declaring a National Emergency at our border. This level of obstruction is disgraceful and far worse than any President has ever faced.

The President had no choice but to declare a National Emergency at our southern border, a major entry point by which criminals, gang members, and drugs that kill American citizens come into our country.

_**THIS IS A NATIONAL EMERGENCY. WE MUST PUT AMERICA FIRST**_

Democrats will do everything they can to make sure THE WALL is never built, so it's up to _**YOU**_ to send them a message to FINISH THE WALL.

We are still short of our ambitious goal of raising **$2,OOO,OOO,** so the President asked us to reach out to you personally, Friend.

We're going to send him a list of EVERY PATRIOT, who stepped up when he needed them the most.

| **[Please make a special contribution by 9 PM EST to show you want to FINISH THE WALL and your donation will be instantly QUADRUPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e4311524e004d162c6193825a0bae3726f2e9f63b06ddb28dbbe90560d9b3c2d27e44d926369532bb58d56f69a92c3fee4)**

**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** We have to do it
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e49e332b409a6ebdfc6fa09cabaa3160f2f86df153879ff8d3a3abae19473172fdb514683a55979fa34d3138652c54cab1)**

---

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi and Democrats have not negotiated in good faith to fund a wall at our Southern Border, proving that obstruction is far more important to them than YOUR SAFETY.

Last week, _**more than 95%**_ of the Patriots I polled demanded a wall. That's because WALLS WORK! I was just in the great city of El Paso, Texas, where illegal traffic has dropped over 90% because of their beautiful wall.

I cannot allow America's safety and security to be put at risk any longer. We need the wall, and I must put _**AMERICA FIRST!**_

Nancy and Democrats have said they will consider filing a legal challenge to ensure the wall is never built, as they continue putting illegal immigrants before Americans. So, we need you to make a HUGE statement to them right now.

I'm setting a goal of raising **$2,OOO,OOO.** I know a goal this big is unprecedented, but we need the American people to make a powerful statement to these Democrats to FINISH THE WALL.

| **[Please make a special contribution by 9 PM EST to show you want to FINISH THE WALL and your donation will be instantly QUADRUPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e4311524e004d162c6193825a0bae3726f2e9f63b06ddb28dbbe90560d9b3c2d27e44d926369532bb58d56f69a92c3fee4)**

[CONTRIBUTE $20 = $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e412fa0f5936d9937c65bc40ec613fbd2ddca6e7033e959ea2ca38d826cd1a38a15bde655e896b67564f7757f23df925c7) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $75](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e4a61f5b8de8555d52ac0c46d8303ae1d7ef0fe216ed8536c44bb18c2794a35568e93501cd3cec87e02a5f9b36d8750901) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $50](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e45329a45b170324f419d0fbcfeb48f707bb2afcddc8de5d040a29fad60565849e43cf4088f4a60b10084657ce9fc483a4) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $25](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e43f8615def2d28cf941a222edf6c9c6079a1e00b29054a652fb0ef5cecdaa7041a726074d9d969b6ab10969141b327e44) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=25bcf2dabb32d2e4454694da9acfad382e6e9bd42ebc4b677b28e9954ced1e47d82626b533ed6ef862e40329eca2387b98c9dd196bb7984c)
This is one of the most CRITICAL moments in the history of our country. _We MUST finish the job._

The wall will be built. Trust me. When the wall is complete, make sure your name is on the _right side of history, having put Americans before illegal immigrants._

Last week, more than 95% of the Patriots I polled demanded a wall. That's because WALLS WORK! I was just in the great city of El Paso, Texas, where illegal traffic has dropped over 90% because of their beautiful wall. I cannot allow America's safety and security to be put at risk any longer. We need the wall, and I must put AMERICA FIRST! Nancy and Democrats have said they will consider filing a legal challenge to ensure the wall is never built, as they continue putting illegal immigrants before Americans. So, we need you to make a HUGE statement to them right now. I'm setting a goal of raising $2,OOO,OOO. I know a goal this big is unprecedented, but we need the American people to make a powerful statement to these Democrats to FINISH THE WALL. | EMAIL: ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT QUADRUPLE MATCH:**UNUSED ************************************************** This is one of the most CRITICAL moments in the history of our country. We MUST finish the job. The wall will be built. Trust me. When the wall is complete, make sure your name is on the right side of history, having put Americans before illegal immigrants. ** Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm taking on a new position:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, did you see the news I shared yesterday?
I'm honored to be the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee's Women's Senate Network.
Last year, 11 Democratic women were elected to the Senate -- including two who flipped seats to Democratic control. But there are still far too few women in Congress, and I'm ready to lead the fight to fix this.
**I can 't do it alone, and we're still short of the $10,000 fundraising goal we set for this weekend. [A $3 gift from you would really help us get there, so could you please consider donating $3 or more to elect more Democratic women in 2020?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f1099b/1580877394/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f10984/1580877394/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f10985/1580877394/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f10986/1580877394/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f1099b/1580877394/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
With historic numbers of women running -- and winning -- in 2018, I have so much hope for our future.
But elections are extremely expensive and women have traditionally faced an uphill battle when it comes to securing the funds needed to win.
[**Your gift could be the difference between adding more Democratic women to the Senate or losing them (and we both know we can 't afford for that to happen), so please rush $3 or however much you can right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f1099b/1580877394/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Please hurry, the deadline is tonight.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f1099b/1580877394/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDMl9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15a/2a380d31/3aaa0089/f10987/1580877394/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Eric Trump
subject: This is CRITICAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
National Emergency details... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4cc42287310b20653a6435b61a27320cb2bf6f1f0cf4e0c1666650762d43ef3646d02711ea9cf9a5a304e4c4158d9a91ebddb04336a51481)
---

Friend,

For weeks, Democrats have been obstructing and the media have been making up lies about the CRISIS at our Southern Border.

They continue to call it a "Manufactured Crisis." There is nothing "manufactured" about American Citizens dying at the hands of MS-13 gangs and drugs pouring through the weak spots at our border.

On Friday, President Trump stood up and fought for AMERICA, by declaring a National Emergency.

Democrats and the Media tried to silence your voice in 2016, Friend, and now they are trying to silence you again.

Let's remind them that the most powerful voice in America is **_YOU,_** and CRUSH our goal of raising **$2,OOO,OOO.**

We are going to hand the President a list of all donors that stood with him at this critical time. Make sure he sees your name.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Photos from South Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I had a wonderful time in South Carolina these past two days visiting Charleston and Columbia, and I wanted to share some photos from the road with you. Our first stop was Mother Emanuel A.M.E. Church in Charleston to pay our respects to the nine victims of the 2015 shooting and leave some flowers in their memory. Then, we headed to Rodney Scott’s BBQ where we ate our fill. The food was amazing, and the people who prepared it were so passionate about both barbecue and the community they serve. I met a woman named Janet there who told me she’s already contributed to our campaign — thank you, Janet! (As you already know, we’re not taking a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists — this campaign is powered by the people, just like you. **[If you want to join Janet with a grassroots contribution, just click here.)](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190217?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190217&t=1&refcode2=3209_5755789_UyhUHl&akid=3209%2E5755789%2EUyhUHl) We closed out our day in Charleston with a town hall where we discussed the tough issues facing our country today: health care, how to get more good jobs, mass incarceration, and more. It was a full house! Great to meet so many folks from South Carolina for the very first time and hear what’s on their minds. We started our Saturday in Columbia visiting local women-owned businesses — these women are incredible entrepreneurs and community leaders. I couldn’t leave without buying this rainbow jacket! At one of the boutiques, I met a young South Carolinian who founded her own anti-bully organization called WEFE — With Everyone For Everyone. I took the WEFE pledge: kindness, respect, and lifting up others. We all could learn something from the WEFE Warriors these days. Then, we headed to our Columbia town hall, where we talked about lifting up the middle class and ensuring all families have the same opportunities to get ahead; why I support the Green New Deal; and more. Thank you for everything, South Carolina. See you again soon. — Kamala
* * *
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190217?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190217&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=2&refcode2=3209_5755789_UyhUHl&akid=3209%2E5755789%2EUyhUHl)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190217?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190217&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=3&refcode2=3209_5755789_UyhUHl&akid=3209%2E5755789%2EUyhUHl)
---
| | [Chip in $50 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190217?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190217&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=3209_5755789_UyhUHl&akid=3209%2E5755789%2EUyhUHl)
---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190217?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190217&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=5&refcode2=3209_5755789_UyhUHl&akid=3209%2E5755789%2EUyhUHl)
---
| | [Chip in $250 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190217?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190217&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=6&refcode2=3209_5755789_UyhUHl&akid=3209%2E5755789%2EUyhUHl)

name: Team Maggie
subject: quick update [electing women in 2020]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc159/2a380d31/3a9f4373/f1061d/1957946113/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Hi -- wanted to share a quick update.
Senator Hassan is 100% committed to electing more women in 2020, and she set a $10,000 goal for this weekend to kick off her tenure as Chair of the Women's Senate Network.
Maggie -- and the women fighting to flip seats to Democratic control -- are really relying on you. But with a few hours left, we're still short.
**With President Trump in the White House, Republicans leading the Senate, and the potential for more vacancies on the Supreme Court, this is really important:[Please make an urgent donation of $3 or more before midnight tonight to ensure that Democratic women have the resources they need to win in 2020.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc159/2a380d31/3a9f4373/f1061e/1957946113/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE3X01XSDREU0NDM19STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190217_MWH4DSCC3_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

clean_body: "" "" Hi -- wanted to share a quick update. Senator Hassan is 100% committed to electing more women in 2020, and she set a $10,000 goal for this weekend to kick off her tenure as Chair of the Women's Senate Network. Maggie -- and the women fighting to flip seats to Democratic control -- are really relying on you. But with a few hours left, we're still short. With President Trump in the White House, Republicans leading the Senate, and the potential for more vacancies on the Supreme Court, this is really important: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Thank you, Team Maggie ""
